prompt: Generate a UI mockup for a healthy food app using the three fruit images as product cards. Display each fruit with its name, price, and an "Add to Cart" button. Use a fresh, fruit-inspired color palette.
prompt_refined:
Generate a UI mockup for a healthy food application. The interface should prominently display three distinct product cards arranged vertically.

- The top product card will feature the content of image 1 (red apples and slices) as its main visual. Below the image, clearly display the text 'Red Apple', a placeholder price such as '$2.99', and an 'Add to Cart' button.
- The middle product card will feature the content of image 2 (strawberries with leaves) as its main visual. Below the image, clearly display the text 'Strawberries', a placeholder price such as '$4.50', and an 'Add to Cart' button.
- The bottom product card will feature the content of image 3 (watermelon slices) as its main visual. Below the image, clearly display the text 'Watermelon', a placeholder price such as '$6.75', and an 'Add to Cart' button.

The overall UI design should utilize a fresh, vibrant, fruit-inspired color palette, drawing hues from the reds, greens, and pale yellows visible in the reference images.
objects: Three distinct product cards, arranged vertically
Top product card featuring red apples and slices
Text 'Red Apple', price '$2.99', and an 'Add to Cart' button on the top card
Middle product card featuring strawberries with leaves
Text 'Strawberries', price '$4.50', and an 'Add to Cart' button on the middle card
Bottom product card featuring watermelon slices
Text 'Watermelon', price '$6.75', and an 'Add to Cart' button on the bottom card
Fresh, vibrant, fruit-inspired color palette (reds, greens, pale yellows)
